en: The LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Command the people of Israel to bring you pure oil from beaten olives for the lamp, that a light may be kept burning regularly.
zh: “你要吩咐以色列人，把點燈用的榨成的純淨橄欖油，拿來給你，使燈火長燃。

en: Outside the veil of the testimony, in the tent of meeting, Aaron shall arrange it from evening to morning before the LORD regularly. It shall be a statute forever throughout your generations.
zh: 在會幕中法櫃的幔子外，亞倫要使這燈在耶和華面前通宵達旦地長燃；這是你們世世代代永遠的律例。

en: He shall arrange the lamps on the lampstand of pure gold before the LORD regularly.
zh: 亞倫要不斷地在耶和華面前，整理純金燈臺 上的燈。

en: "You shall take fine flour and bake twelve loaves from it; two tenths of an ephah shall be in each loaf.
zh: “你要取細麵烤成十二個餅，每一個餅用兩公斤細麵。

en: And you shall set them in two piles, six in a pile, on the table of pure gold before the LORD.
zh: 你要把餅擺列成兩排，每排六個，放在耶和華面前精金的桌子 上；

en: And you shall put pure frankincense on each pile, that it may go with the bread as a memorial portion as a food offering to the LORD.
zh: 把純乳香放在每排餅上，象徵這些餅作獻給耶和華的火祭。

en: Every Sabbath day Aaron shall arrange it before the LORD regularly; it is from the people of Israel as a covenant forever.
zh: 每一個安息日，亞倫都要把餅擺在耶和華面前，不可間斷，這是以色列人永遠的約。

en: And it shall be for Aaron and his sons, and they shall eat it in a holy place, since it is for him a most holy portion out of the LORD's food offerings, a perpetual due."
zh: 這餅要歸給亞倫和他的子孫，他們要在聖潔的地方吃，因為這是至聖的，在獻給耶和華的火祭中，他永遠的分。”

en: Now an Israelite woman's son, whose father was an Egyptian, went out among the people of Israel. And the Israelite woman's son and a man of Israel fought in the camp,
zh: 有一個以色列婦人的兒子，父親是埃及人，在以色列人中間出入；這以色列婦人的兒子在營裡和一個以色列人爭吵；

en: and the Israelite woman's son blasphemed the Name, and cursed. Then they brought him to Moses. His mother's name was Shelomith, the daughter of Dibri, of the tribe of Dan.
zh: 這以色列婦人的兒子褻瀆耶和華的名，咒詛耶和華的名，人就把他帶到摩西那裡。

en: And they put him in custody, till the will of the LORD should be clear to them.
zh: 他們拘留看守那人，等候耶和華給他們的指示。

en: Then the LORD spoke to Moses, saying,
zh: 耶和華對摩西說：

en: "Bring out of the camp the one who cursed, and let all who heard him lay their hands on his head, and let all the congregation stone him.
zh: “把那咒詛聖名的人拉出營外，聽見的人都按手在他頭上。然後全體會眾要扔石頭打死他。

en: And speak to the people of Israel, saying, Whoever curses his God shall bear his sin.
zh: 你要告訴以色列人：咒詛 神的，必擔當自己的罪。

en: Whoever blasphemes the name of the LORD shall surely be put to death. All the congregation shall stone him. The sojourner as well as the native, when he blasphemes the Name, shall be put to death.
zh: 褻瀆耶和華聖名的人，必被處死，全體會眾要扔石頭打他；不論是寄居的外人或是本地人，如果褻瀆聖名，必被處死。

en: "Whoever takes a human life shall surely be put to death.
zh: 打死人的，必被處死。

en: Whoever takes an animal's life shall make it good, life for life.
zh: 打死牲畜的，必要賠償牲畜，以命償命。

en: If anyone injures his neighbor, as he has done it shall be done to him,
zh: 如果有人使他的同伴傷殘；他怎樣待人，人也必怎樣待他；

en: fracture for fracture, eye for eye, tooth for tooth; whatever injury he has given a person shall be given to him.
zh: 以傷還傷，以眼還眼，以牙還牙；他怎樣使人傷殘，人也必怎樣使他傷殘。

en: Whoever kills an animal shall make it good, and whoever kills a person shall be put to death.
zh: 打死牲畜的，必要賠償牲畜；打死人的，必被處死。

en: You shall have the same rule for the sojourner and for the native, for I am the LORD your God."
zh: 無論是寄居的或是本地人，你們都應一律對待，因為我是耶和華你們的 神。”

en: So Moses spoke to the people of Israel, and they brought out of the camp the one who had cursed and stoned him with stones. Thus the people of Israel did as the LORD commanded Moses.
zh: 於是摩西告訴了以色列人，他們就把那咒詛聖名的人帶出營外，扔石頭打死他。以色列人遵行了耶和華給摩西的吩咐。
